shorts.description: Shorts are the call when feels-like temp is above threshold

longs.description: Longs when feels-like is below this

layers.description: The grey zone - could go either way, lean toward layers

evening_layer.action: Suggest bringing a layer for evening

workout.note: Running hot during exercise, lower thresholds

formal.note: Dress code overrides comfort, but note the weather

confidence_levels.high: Clear call, no edge cases. 10F+ away from any threshold.
confidence_levels.medium: Within 5F of a threshold or mixed conditions.
confidence_levels.low: Right on the line, weather is changing, or unusual conditions.
